sglang.author: ch-wan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Follow-up to the AITER MoE runner refactor in #23597. After that PR, every quant method (FP8, MXFP4, Quark W4A4 / INT4-FP8, Compressed-Tensors W8A8 FP8, Unquant) routes aiter.fused_moe through MoeRunner for the standard none a2a backend. The two remaining direct aiter.fused_moe call sites

sglang.title: [diffusion] feat: configure encoder as layerwise-offload by default
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Encoder/VAE layerwise offload benchmark
We benchmarked component-only stages to compare cpu_offload, layerwise_offload, and fully GPU-resident execution. These numbers measure only the encoder or VAE stage, so they validate the offload policy itself without denoising latency diluting the result.

sglang.bodyExcerpt:

update existing scenarios only when the latest CI run showed at least one >=5% top-level improvement and no top-level regression

[ ] DeepEPMoE.forward_*

Summary
Enable trtllm_mha as the default attention backend for Gemma4 on SM100.
When --attention-backend is not specified for Gemma4ForConditionalGeneration, SGLang now selects:

trtllm_mha on SM100
triton otherwise

This keeps the existing non-SM100 behavior unchanged while enabling the Blackwell-o

sglang.title: [BugFix] UniPC device placement + FlowUniPC sigma_min crash fix
sglang.author: jy-song-hub
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
UniPCMultistepScheduler device mismatch
UniPCMultistepScheduler.set_timesteps(device=...)  previously pinned  self.sigmas  to CPU unconditionally. This can cause a runtime crash when the pipeline runs on CUDA/MPS and  sigma  is used as a non-scalar tensor (e.g., shape[1] ), because PyTorc

sglang.title: refactor: remove ModelWorkerBatch indirection
sglang.author: hnyls2002

Drop ModelWorkerBatch; ForwardBatch.init_new now consumes ScheduleBatch directly
Move seq_lens_cpu_cache / capture_hidden_mode / return_hidden_states_before_norm onto ScheduleBatch as one-shot overrides (init_new consumes and resets)
Snapshot+restore SB across spec V2 overlap forward via _overlap_fo

Add EPD (Encoder–Prefill–Decode) disaggregation support for MiMo-V2, enabling the visual/audio encoder to run on a separate node from the language model. This mirrors the encoder-disaggregation pattern already supported for Qwen2-VL / Qwen3-VL / Qwen2.5-Omni and reuses the existing encode_se

The detokenizer now filters special token ids when skip_special_tokens=True and then calls native tokenizer

sglang.title: Use DeepGEMM BF16 for unquantized DeepEP LL MoE
sglang.author: YAMY1234
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This is a follow-up to #24906. The merged implementation enabled BF16 DeepEP dispatch for every quant_config=None MoE layer, which is too broad. This PR narrows the behavior to the target case: unquantized DeepEP low-latency MoE on CUDA, used by the Qwen3.5 NVFP4 MTP/NextN draft MoE path.

vllm.title: [BugFix] Kimi-K2.5: skip vision tower dtype conversion when using quantization
vllm.author: gaozihao-shy
vllm.bodyExcerpt: _maybe_ignore_quant_config returns non-None when the quantization backend supports ViT (e.g. AscendModelSlimConfig). In that case call .to(device) only, avoiding dtype conversion that would corrupt quantized parameters. When it returns None, keep the original device+dtype conversion.
